flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Allegany College of Maryland rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.3k → $12.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Allegany College of Maryland fell 10% between 2006 and 2009 (26.9% → 24.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Allegany College of Maryland fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Allegany College of Maryland rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (59.8% → 66.1%).
